rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 04, 2013, line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT BARBARIA, ILLONA DRUCKER, AS SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. rulings.Case Title: CITY LIFE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. PLACE OF FRANK'S LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Application To Expunge Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 04, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT PLACE OF FRANK'S LLC Notice Of Motion And Application To Expunge Lis Pendens. DENIED. Plaintiff has shown probable validity of its specific performance claim by preponderance of evidence. Plaintiff's request for attorney's fees in the amount of $5,075 is granted. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES, LP VS. TAKEOFF USA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 04, 2013, line 7. CROSS DEFENDANT JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES, LP DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED with 10 day leave to amend to address all issues as to the first and second causes of action raised by demurrer. Plaintiff's counsel is ordered again (See Minute Order 4/5/13, case 525509) to comply with SFLR 2.6C. = (501/REQ)
